visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco retail environment with a woman wearing a fuzzy grey hat and a pink textured sweater. She holds a large clear bowl of seafood soup directly toward the camera, her face showing a broad, excited smile with wide eyes. Bright store lighting illuminates the scene, and the Costco logo is superimposed at the top. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up of the food bowl. The woman’s hands, wearing clear plastic gloves, point to the label and the layers of large pink shrimp and white crab meat resting on green cabbage. The background shows blurred shoppers and metal store shelves, indicating a busy warehouse setting. (3) The setting shifts to a modern, brightly lit indoor living room. Two women sit at a wooden table; one holds a plastic bag containing thick soup base while the other holds the seafood bowl. They interact with the camera, explaining the product components with animated facial expressions and hand gestures. (4) A close-up shot follows where one woman uses pink chopsticks to separate and count the shrimp and crab pieces. The lighting is even and bright. The shrimp are arranged on a plate, and the crab meat remains in the bowl with green garnishes. (5) The scene cuts to a stainless steel pot on a stove where the seafood soup is boiling. Steam rises visibly from the bubbling brown liquid which is filled with shrimp, cabbage, and mushrooms. A black ladle stirs the mixture, showcasing the density of the ingredients. (6) Back at the table, the two women are shown eating the soup from small bowls. They look at the camera, nodding and giving a thumbs up. A large yellow "9分" graphic appears on screen to indicate their high rating of the food.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 超誠意. [Slogan]: 鮮蝦蟹肉海鮮羹. (2) [Subtitle]: 這是新的. (3) [Subtitle]: 它有好多蝦. (4) [Subtitle]: 一公斤389元. (5) [Subtitle]: 我買到499的. (6) [Subtitle]: 回去吃看看哦. (7) [Subtitle]: 這裡的羹 希望好吃. (8) [Subtitle]: 哇 蟹肉哎. [Variety]: 哇 蟹肉哎. (9) [Subtitle]: 沒有人等我. (10) [Slogan]: 鮮蝦蟹肉海鮮羹 499元. (11) [Subtitle]: 那它這裡面有非常多的. (12) [Subtitle]: 蝦子以及蟹肉. (13) [Subtitle]: 然後附一袋羹湯. (14) [Subtitle]: 裡面還有含豬肉 現在來加熱看看. (15) [Subtitle]: 蝦子是一般的大小 總共有21隻. (16) [Subtitle]: 然後這裡呢 蟹肉有11個. (17) [Subtitle]: 很多蝦子哎 讚讚. [Variety]: 讚讚. (18) [Subtitle]: 蝦子蟹肉 肉眼可見. (19) [Subtitle]: 海鮮羹 1-10分的話我們會給. (20) [Variety]: 9分. (21) [Subtitle]: 因為它真的很好吃 料多是的特點. (22) [Subtitle]: 滿滿的餡料. (23) [Subtitle]: 蝦子啊蟹肉 你煮下去. (24) [Subtitle]: 都還可以看得見 滿滿都是. (25) [Subtitle]: 然後除了白菜 還給你金針菇. (26) [Subtitle]: 香菇還有小蝦米. (27) [Subtitle]: 而且調味也調的 非常誠意. (28) [Subtitle]: 不需要自己再另外調整太多. (29) [Subtitle]: 如果你愛吃辣的話 可以加點白胡椒鹽. (30) [Subtitle]: 就是非常的香 清香. (31) [Subtitle]: 我覺得食材也很好 因為它的白菜. (32) [Subtitle]: 都還有脆甜. (33) [Subtitle]: 這鍋非常的推薦. (34) [Subtitle]: 500元 2-4人都可以. (35) [Subtitle]: 2個人會吃很飽. (36) [Subtitle]: 2個人會超撐. (37) [Subtitle]: 4個人加麵加蛋 剛剛好.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair, wears a fuzzy grey and white hat, a pink textured knit sweater over a yellow shirt. The second woman has long black hair and wears a black top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scenes are in a Costco warehouse store showing refrigeration units, food labels, and other shoppers. Later scenes are in a home dining area with a wooden table, plain white walls, and household storage boxes in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track starts with high-pitched, energetic female narration over a fast-tempo, upbeat pop-style background music with a strong electronic beat. Background ambient noise includes distant warehouse store chatter and the low rumble of shopping carts. The speaker’s voice is clear and projected. (2) A sharp "whoosh" sound effect marks a transition. The primary female speaker continues at a fast speech rate, her tone consistently excited and positive. The BGM remains steady in volume, maintaining a cheerful atmosphere while occasional percussive hits in the music align with editing cuts. (3) The acoustic environment shifts to a cleaner, indoor room tone with less background noise. Two distinct female voices are heard in a lively dialogue. The music continues in the background, but the vocal ratio is high as they detail the price and contents of the meal. (4) Distinct percussive clicking sounds are heard as chopsticks hit the plastic container and plates. These transient sounds are sharp and clear. The speakers use high vocal variability and dynamic intonation to emphasize their points about the food's quality and quantity. (5) A prominent sound of liquid boiling and bubbling becomes the focus, accompanied by a slight swell in the background music's intensity. The sound has a broad spectral bandwidth. The female narration continues over this, describing the cooking process with high arousal. (6) The final phase features overlapping voices of the two women as they taste the food. A bright "sparkle" or "ding" sound effect coincides with a visual score appearing. The audio ends with a high-energy conclusive remark and the music fading out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Ingredient/Price Breakdown -> Cooking Process -> Tasting/Review -> Final Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional food review for a specific seafood soup product from Costco. It combines an initial 'shopping discovery' hook with an at-home demonstration of the product's quantity (counting individual shrimp) and taste, culminating in a numerical score to encourage viewers to purchase the item for group meals.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of brand logo, price information, and highly positive review/recommendation of a specific store-brand product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media 'short-form' editing style with high text density and rapid cuts to maintain engagement. The creators focus on 'value for money' by counting ingredients.
